name: SwimWays Rainbow Reef Shark Toy, Finn Diesel Kids Shark Pool Toy and Swimming Accessory, Self-Activated Water Toys, Learn to Swim Pool Toys for Kids Ages 5 & Up (Batteries Included)
bullets: Rainbow Reef: Transform your pool into a colorful tropical reef with the SwimWays Rainbow Reef; play alongside vibrant, lifelike fish and sharks that swim on their own in every direction as soon as you put these cute sensory toys in the water

Water-Activated: Simply submerge this pool and bath toy in the water to activate- now you can watch them swim like real fish above and below the water, with variable speeds and natural swimming patterns

Learn to Swim Practice: Rainbow Reef kids toys are made for everyday play, summer pool parties, pool games, and inspiring littles to embrace the process of learning to swim; kids won't even realize they’re building underwater swimming skills

Travel-Friendly Design: At 5 inches long, these small waterproof figures are designed to go anywhere the adventure does for easy on-the-go play; now kids ages 5 and up can practice swim skills and play under water games anywhere

Collect them All: Endless water games and outdoor fun awaits the Rainbow Reef- they’re also fun pool party favors and party supplies for all ages; styles: LeBron Waves, Tuna Turner, Guppie Goldberg, Swim Shady. Requires 2 AAA batteries (included)
Includes: 1 SwimWays Rainbow Reef Shark Toy, 2 AAA Batteries
description: Transform your pool into a colorful tropical reef with the SwimWays Rainbow Reef dive toys! Dive under the water to see the magical toys come to life as realistic, lifelike fish and shark toys that paddle through the water in every direction and imitate real animal movements. This kids pool toy even changes speeds as it swims and moves up and down through the water, making for an exciting chase! These colorful water toys are made for everyday play, pool party games, and to encourage the process of learning to swim. Kids won't even know they are building their underwater swimming skills! These

reviews.name: Cindy
reviews.title: Awesome stuff!
reviews.body: If you don’t have one of these (or all, like ) GET THEM!! So stinking cute the shark dives far so cool!! I only need one more waiting for sale! But seriously if these don’t make you and the kids smile not sure what will!!!

reviews.name: gary johnson
reviews.title: Don’t hesitate to order these!  They are fun!
reviews.body: The granddaughters loved these! They really swim and go under water. Battery has lasted a long time and still working! Highly recommend these for water fun.

reviews.name: Coleen B.
reviews.title: Don’t skip this water toy!
reviews.body: These are the cutest toys for water play. My grandson is three and learning to swim. He loves to dive for objects with his goggles. These motorized fish are the cutest thing swimming in the water. He dove, caught and played with his shark and fish for almost 2 hours. He did not want to get out of the pool.They do well in the bath for a fun change from other bath toys. Highly recommend this water…

reviews.name: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Lots of fun!
reviews.body: These are the cutest swimming , diving fish. Great quality , beautiful colors. My grandchild loves playing with them.
